user.title: Create remote binding
user.description: Bind a labelled trigger-capable device to a target device or entity.

error.remote_and_target_same: Trigger device and target cannot be the same device.
error.unsupported_target: That target does not expose a supported control profile.
error.no_remote_devices: No labelled trigger-capable devices were found.
error.no_supported_target_devices: No supported target devices were found.
error.no_supported_target_entities: No supported target entities were found.

abort.bootstrap_ready: Dinodia Remote Manager is already active and ready for trigger-device discovery.
abort.bootstrap_options_not_supported: This bootstrap entry has no editable binding settings.

update_binding.name: Update binding
update_binding.description: Create or replace the target for one remote binding.

unbind.name: Unbind
unbind.description: Remove a binding by binding id or remote device id.

resolve_binding.name: Resolve binding
resolve_binding.description: Return the computed target capability profile for a binding.

list_bindings.name: List bindings
list_bindings.description: Return all stored remote bindings for diagnostics.

simulate_remote_event.name: Simulate remote event
simulate_remote_event.description: Fire a normalized remote event through the router for testing.

list_trigger_devices.name: List trigger devices
list_trigger_devices.description: Return labelled devices that expose Home Assistant device triggers and have no actionable target for Dinodia trigger-device discovery.

list_trigger_device_dashboard.name: List trigger device dashboard
list_trigger_device_dashboard.description: Return accepted trigger devices with compact binding and target details for Dinodia dashboards.

set_trigger_target.name: Set trigger target
set_trigger_target.description: Create or replace a trigger-device target binding and create the matching Dinodia Remote Manager entry.

remove_tenant_bindings.name: Remove tenant bindings
remove_tenant_bindings.description: Remove all trigger-device bindings owned by a Dinodia tenant user.

remove_trigger_bindings_for_devices.name: Remove trigger bindings for devices
remove_trigger_bindings_for_devices.description: Remove tenant-owned trigger bindings for specific HA trigger-device IDs.
